class ModelNew(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, dim):
        self.dim = dim
    def forward(self, x):
        # Move reduction dim to last
        perm = list(range(x.dim()))
        perm.append(perm.pop(self.dim))
        x_t = x.permute(perm)
        y_t = custom_ops_lib.argmax_over_a_dimension_custom(x_t)  # kernel reduces last dim
